questionHtml: Deduce the number of signals and chemical shifts with splitting patterns in the 1H NMR spectrum of ethoxyethane. Use section 27 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
2 «signals» ✔

0.9−1.0 AND triplet ✔

3.3−3.7 AND quartet ✔

Accept any values in the ranges.

Award [1] for two correct chemical shifts or two correct splitting patterns.

meta.title: Deduce the number of signals and chemical shifts with splitting patterns in the 1H NMR spectrum of ethoxyethane. Use section 27 of the data booklet.
